spIBDerverse 0.0.0.9000
  • Reference
    • Hammersley-Clifford theorem
    • homophily-measures
    • Using the spIBDerapp

Transform vector to (a,b)

Source: R/transform_alpha.R
transform_alpha.Rd

Transform vector to (a,b)

Usage

transform_alpha(x, a = 0, b = 1)

Arguments

x

vector to transform

a

lower bound of transform

b

upper bound of transform

Value

transformed vector

Examples

transform_alpha(runif(100))
#>   [1] 0.347007717 0.927982254 0.332436524 0.430019360 0.575122999 0.389506236
#>   [7] 0.164578245 0.694342011 0.261629327 0.241542060 0.450659316 0.412761904
#>  [13] 0.426426173 0.184780191 0.436006385 0.376179632 0.559921091 0.149909942
#>  [19] 0.451185944 0.296563968 0.183531733 0.184670109 0.122049403 0.995976417
#>  [25] 0.902489301 0.298591440 0.322332400 0.252294766 0.750563552 0.824498209
#>  [31] 0.306745246 0.939030260 0.223479761 0.919669751 0.881622590 0.427388530
#>  [37] 0.577234297 0.806071728 0.094200142 0.619823544 0.543278267 0.968912042
#>  [43] 0.643341952 0.372056149 0.332479627 0.645495733 0.811664511 0.159663168
#>  [49] 0.202583332 0.006482448 0.670886388 0.528317097 0.017576159 0.263845533
#>  [55] 0.561449461 0.703134579 0.368136717 0.317932424 0.836841445 0.575153249
#>  [61] 0.665605583 0.877961638 0.030991627 0.006017588 0.000000000 0.127065870
#>  [67] 0.876965870 0.704481217 0.133699845 0.452368570 0.156781622 0.814441416
#>  [73] 0.896403135 0.503707431 0.685416861 0.774333042 0.564376583 0.569090553
#>  [79] 0.862627227 0.756652594 0.746482889 0.617884922 0.767071415 0.731503424
#>  [85] 0.912788449 0.225236136 0.784052912 0.109586237 0.396841141 0.825608954
#>  [91] 0.305218038 0.454984091 0.351852368 0.183605996 0.845724109 0.804210561
#>  [97] 1.000000000 0.734580944 0.132498605 0.434335975
